data.body:
I've wondered about Italian street materials for 3 years. They are stone slabs, covered in small irregular divots. "How?"

In Sicily, I saw the "How" firsthand. This guy was working hard, sunglasses his only protective gear, flakes of stone flying, manually texturing the stone.
